title: Conditional Status Changes - allow ability to check for File column

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently implementing Monday Sales CRM and the conditional status change feature is super useful in guiding agents.

However I would bring forward two suggestionst to realize its potential:

  • allow file columns to be part of conditional status changes. This would really be a game changer for us, as it would help us enforce employees to upload contract files after a deal has been closed (we plan on using Monday.com as a central source of truth, so all relevant files should be put into the system)

  • allow mirror columns to be part of conditional status changes. Sometimes we will mirror columns from other boards, and having conditional status changes work with those mirrored colcumns would help a lot.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Conditional Status Changes are now live across all monday products! Check out Conditional Status Smart Column - add conditions such as mandatory columns, assigned person or team prior statuses for enforcing conditional logic to monday.com boards
